alerts.title: US 40 Milner Resurfacing-138303
alerts.description: Between Duckels-Bettger Pit Road (2 miles west of the Steamboat Springs area) and Old US 40 (2 miles east of the Hayden area) from Mile Point 126 to Mile Point 112. Road construction. Alternating traffic. Starting July 21, 2026 at 7:00PM MDT until July 22, 2026 at about 6:00AM MDT. Full schedule below: • July 21, 7:00PM - July 22, 6:00AM Comment: Nighttime paving operations are from 7 p.m. to 6 a.m. Pilot cars are leading vehicles through the work zone. Vehicles will be reduced to a single-lane, alternating traffic intermittently in either direction, throughout the duration of the project Lane closures, guided by flaggers, will have up to 10-minute delays. The speed limit will be reduced to 40 mph through the work zone. The project is expected to last until the middle of November.

alerts.title: US 40 over Shelton Ditch-138275
alerts.description: Between County Road 51A and Shelton Lane (near Hayden) from Mile Point 108.5 to Mile Point 108.3. Road construction. Starting July 22, 2026 at 7:00AM MDT until July 22, 2026 at about 7:00PM MDT. Full schedule below: • July 22, 7:00AM - July 22, 7:00PM Comment: Daytime work hours will be 7 a.m. to 7 p.m. in order to accommodate the commuter traffic on the US 40 corridor, Monday through Friday. A temporary detour is in place. The speed limit will be reduced to 30 mph through the work zone. The project is expected to last until early October. Several other projects are occurring this season on the US 40 corridor. For more information on these projects, please visit: www.cotrip.org
